channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Bugsy - Wed Jun 03 11:53:45 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: OptIn - Wed Jun 03 17:31:43 UTC 2026
item.description:
The OptIn plugin for IntelliJ provides inspections and quickfixes for Osmerion's Java port of Kotlin's opt-in mechanism. Learn more at https://osmerion.github.io/OptIn.
vendor: Osmerion downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.osmerion.optin
